pair.title: Set up your Daikin Airbase unit
pair.subtitle: Add the device first, then enter the Airbase IP address in device settings.
pair.intro: This first version uses the Daikin local LAN API. After adding the device, open its settings and enter the Airbase IP or hostname.

errors.poll_interval: Poll interval must be at least 15 seconds.

errors.missing_host: Missing Airbase IP address or hostname in device settings.
